name: Lekunberri - Leitza – circular por la Vía Verde del Plazaola
region_intro: Mountain biking around Lekunberri offers diverse terrain within the heart of Navarre, Spain. The region is characterized by the Aralar mountains, extensive beech and oak forests, and green valleys. A notable feature is the Plazaola Greenway, which provides accessible routes through varied natural settings. The landscape includes both gentle paths and challenging mountain trails with significant elevation changes. Best mountain bike trails around Lekunberri The most popular mountain bike trail is Lekunberri - Leitza – circular por la Vía Verde del Plazaola, a 23.9 miles (38.4 km) difficult route that takes about 3 hours 59 minutes to complete. This circular path follows sections of the historic Plazaola Greenway. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Santa Cruz Tunnel – Plazaola Greenway loop from Lekunberri, a moderate 22.0 miles (35.4 km) path. This route includes passage through the Santa Cruz Tunnel and explores the greenway's varied landscape. Local mountain bikers also love the Cantina del Plazaola – Santa Cruz Tunnel loop from Lekunberri, a 24.0 miles (38.6 km) trail leading through varied terrain, often completed in about 3 hours 32 minutes. This difficult route passes by the Cantina del Plazaola, a popular stopping point. Mountain biking around Lekunberri is defined by the Sierra de Aralar mountain range, the Plazaola Greenway, and extensive beech forests. The network offers options for different ability levels, from moderate rides to challenging routes with significant elevation gains. The routes in Lekunberri are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.2 stars from over 80 reviews. More than 1000 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Lekunberri's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails are there in Lekunberri?
A: Lekunberri offers a wide variety of mountain bike trails, with over 60 routes available for exploration. These trails cater to different skill levels, from moderate to difficult.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on mountain bike trails around Lekunberri?
A: The terrain around Lekunberri is diverse, ranging from the accessible, converted railway line of the &lt;strong&gt;Plazaola Greenway&lt;/strong&gt; to more challenging paths within the &lt;strong&gt;Sierra de Aralar&lt;/strong&gt; mountain range. You'll encounter a mix of compact dirt tracks, paved sections, and routes through extensive beech and oak forests, often with significant elevation changes.

Q: Are there any family-friendly mountain bike routes in Lekunberri?
A: Yes, the &lt;strong&gt;Plazaola Greenway&lt;/strong&gt; is particularly well-suited for families and less experienced riders. It follows an old narrow-gauge railway line, offering a picturesque and generally accessible journey through natural surroundings. While the guide lists 4 easy routes, many of the moderate trails can also be enjoyed by families with some cycling experience.

Q: What are some notable natural features or landmarks I can see while mountain biking?
A: You can discover several interesting features. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/1995262" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Plazaola Greenway&lt;/a&gt; itself is a major highlight, passing through diverse landscapes. Routes like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/38153827" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cantina del Plazaola – View of the Dos Hermanas Gorge loop from Lekunberri&lt;/a&gt; offer scenic views of the &lt;strong&gt;Dos Hermanas Gorge&lt;/strong&gt;. You might also encounter the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4207308" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;San Miguel de Aralar Sanctuary&lt;/a&gt; in the mountains or the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3552575" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Aixita Castle Ruins&lt;/a&gt; offering panoramic views.

Q: Are there circular mountain bike routes available?
A: Yes, many routes around Lekunberri are circular. For example, the popular &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e990001624/lekunberri-leitza-circular-por-la-via-verde-del-plazaola" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Lekunberri - Leitza – circular por la Vía Verde del Plazaola&lt;/a&gt; is a difficult 38.4 km loop. Another option is the moderate &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/10530881" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Santa Cruz Tunnel – Plazaola Greenway loop from Lekunberri&lt;/a&gt;, which covers 35.4 km.

Q: What is the best time of year to go mountain biking in Lekunberri?
A: May and October are particularly popular months for cycling in Lekunberri due to favorable weather conditions. However, the region generally offers good mountain biking opportunities throughout spring, summer, and early autumn.

Q: What are the difficulty levels of mountain bike trails in Lekunberri?
A: The trails around Lekunberri cater to various skill levels. You'll find 4 easy routes, 27 moderate routes, and 36 difficult routes. Difficult routes, especially those in the Sierra de Aralar, often involve significant elevation gains and require good fitness and advanced riding skills.

Q: Are there any places to stop for refreshments along the trails?
A: Yes, the &lt;strong&gt;Cantina del Plazaola&lt;/strong&gt; is a popular stopping point along the Plazaola Greenway, often recommended for a coffee break. Routes like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/31476045" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cantina del Plazaola – Santa Cruz Tunnel loop from Lekunberri&lt;/a&gt; pass directly by it.

Q: What do other mountain bikers say about the trails in Lekunberri?
A: The mountain bike trails in Lekunberri are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.2 stars from over 80 reviews. Riders often praise the varied terrain, the beauty of the &lt;strong&gt;Plazaola Greenway&lt;/strong&gt;, and the challenging yet rewarding climbs in the &lt;strong&gt;Sierra de Aralar&lt;/strong&gt;.

Q: Are there any advanced mountain bike trails for experienced riders?
A: Absolutely. Lekunberri offers 36 difficult mountain bike routes, many of which explore the rugged terrain of the &lt;strong&gt;Sierra de Aralar&lt;/strong&gt;. These trails often feature significant elevation gains and technical sections, providing a demanding experience for advanced riders. An example is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e990001624/lekunberri-leitza-circular-por-la-via-verde-del-plazaola" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Lekunberri - Leitza – circular por la Vía Verde del Plazaola&lt;/a&gt;, which is rated difficult.

Q: How long do mountain bike routes typically take in Lekunberri?
A: Route durations vary significantly based on difficulty and distance. Moderate routes might take around 3-4 hours, such as the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/10530881" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Santa Cruz Tunnel – Plazaola Greenway loop from Lekunberri&lt;/a&gt; (approx. 3 hours 6 minutes). More difficult and longer routes, like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/38153827" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cantina del Plazaola – View of the Dos Hermanas Gorge loop from Lekunberri&lt;/a&gt;, can take over 4 hours 30 minutes to complete.
tips: Picturesque and wide plain in the area of Arrospide on the way to Ullizar with a good path for riding.
The summit of Ulizar is at 868 meters above sea level and the views from here are very beautiful towards the entire valley of northern Navarre and neighboring Euskadi.

The Plazaola greenway is a route that takes advantage of the route of an old narrow gauge railway, the Plazaola, which linked the Spanish towns of San Sebastián and Pamplona.

An incredible route to travel by bicycle.
Section with tunnels, some with lighting. Safer to bring your own lighting, there are potholes (potholes) in unlit areas.
The Plazaola canteen can give you a good excuse on the way. A stop to rest, eat or have a drink with views of the Sierra de Aralar.
